commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Control UI settings-restore sanitizer that resets legacy top-level routed session keys to `main` while preserving scoped `sessionsByGateway` selections, plus storage regression tests.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +151. Total +209 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: seed the legacy top-level stored `sessionKey` / `lastActiveSessionKey` with a routed key and current main returns it unchanged from `loadSettings`. I did not run the test suite in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should decide the proof sufficiency and persisted-session compatibility boundary; I found no narrow automated code repair to request.
